scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm --filter @agent-native/core build && pnpm install
scripts.dev:all: pnpm --filter @agent-native/core build && concurrently -n app,ws,ui -c yellow,blue,green "pnpm --filter @agent-native/example-deck-generator dev" "pnpm --filter @agent-native/harness-claude-code dev:server -- --app-dir ../example-deck-generator" "APP_PORT=8080 pnpm --filter @agent-native/harness-claude-code dev:client"
scripts.dev:all:single-port: pnpm --filter @agent-native/core build && concurrently -n app,docs,ws,ui -c yellow,magenta,blue,green "pnpm --filter @agent-native/example-deck-generator exec vite --base /app/" "pnpm --filter @agent-native/docs dev:proxied" "pnpm --filter @agent-native/harness-claude-code dev:server -- --app-dir ../example-deck-generator" "APP_PORT=8080 DOCS_PORT=3000 pnpm --filter @agent-native/harness-claude-code dev:client"
